cases.pending_question: Explain your approach to database indexing.

cases.message: We chose cache-aside with Redis because reads dominated and we needed sub-millisecond p99 latency. The trade-off was consistency versus freshness; we invalidated on writes and monitored hit ratio in Grafana.
cases.pending_question: How would you scale read-heavy API traffic using Redis cache-aside?
